source.description: ASA NAT for port forwarding (HTTP, SMTP servers), dynamic PAT with address pool, and ACL for outside access

config.description: Static NAT for web and mail servers (port forwarding), dynamic PAT for internal users, outside ACL for internet access to servers

expected_translation.high_level: Huawei USG equivalent with nat server protocol tcp global interface vs local-server, nat outbound, and security-policy

verification.notes: clean deployable — RC3 live verification: NAT server port mappings complete (www, smtp), external interface IP correctly mapped, internal server IPs preserved, ACL + traffic-filter applied on outside interface inbound. Source NAT using address-group also correctly translated.
